articles.title: HOW TO BOOST ECOMMERCE WITH GENAI AND LLMS
articles.summary: Generative AI and large language models are transforming online retail, from creating tailored recommendations to enabling interactive

articles.title: experiences like virtual try-ons. This eBook from Algolia
articles.summary: clarifies the differences and synergies between genAI and LLMs and reveals how these technologies can streamline operations while maximizing customer engagement and satisfaction. Download your free copy today [4] to uncover how AI can set your ecommerce business apart in today's competitive landscape.

articles.title: FRANCOIS CHOLLET LEAVES GOOGLE
articles.summary: The creator of Keras and the Arc eval (among many other things) has left Google. He will continue to support the Jax and Keras community while pursuing other endeavors.

articles.title: CHATGPT DESKTOP
articles.summary: OpenAI has launched ChatGPT desktop integrations to rival Copilot.

articles.title: OPENAI TO PRESENT PLANS FOR U.S. AI STRATEGY AND AN ALLIANCE TO COMPETE WITH CHINA
articles.summary: OpenAI's AI infrastructure blueprint proposes AI economic zones and partnerships with the U.S. Navy on nuclear power to boost AI-driven economic growth and innovation. The plan includes a North American AI alliance and initiatives similar to the National Interstate and Defense Highways Act to support infrastructure needs. It emphasizes investment in U.S. data centers and energy projects to maintain a competitive edge over China.

articles.title: INTRODUCING ATHENE-V2: ADVANCING BEYOND THE LIMITS OF SCALING WITH TARGETED POST-TRAINING
articles.summary: Athene V2 is a series of models trained on top of Qwen 2.5 72B. They are specifically tuned for agentic and chat workflows and surpass GPT-4o in a number of critical benchmarks.

articles.title: PHYSICS-INFORMED DISTILLATION
articles.summary: Physics Informed Distillation (PID) is a technique that uses a student model to simplify and speed up diffusion models by representing them as solutions to differential equations.

articles.title: LEARN TO RIDE THE (AI) WAVES OR RISK CRASHING INTO THEM
articles.summary: Ironically, AI is often deployed very unintelligently. FOMO can lead organizations to “throw in” new apps, creating stubborn layers of technical debt. Learn simple steps to future-proof process architecture [11], so your business is ready for tomorrow's innovation, and find out how process orchestration helps you realize

articles.title: AI value today. Read the blog by Camunda CEO Jakob Freund
MINERU: HIGH-QUALITY DATA EXTRACTION TOOL
articles.summary: MinerU is a high quality tool based on StructTable-InternVL2-1B that allows for the extraction of information from PDFs to a number of machine readable formats.

articles.title: ISOTONIC REGRESSION
articles.summary: A powerful technique for fitting a monotonic function to data. It can be differentiated really well for a number of applications outside of curve fitting.

articles.title: TEXT-TO-SQL QUERY
articles.summary: XiYan-SQL is a novel framework designed to improve the accuracy and diversity of SQL queries generated from natural language.

articles.title: X PORTRAIT 2
articles.summary: Bytedance's AI group continues to release some amazing technology. X Portrait 2 is a continuation of its video acting model with improved realism and consistency for actor-to-video.

articles.title: CREATE 360° VIEWS FROM LIMITED IMAGES
articles.summary: The MVSplat360 model offers a new way to create realistic 360° views of real-world scenes, even from just a few sparse images.

articles.title: BRAIN TUMOR DETECTION
articles.summary: This paper showcases the top solution for brain tumor segmentation in the BraTS challenge, highlighting how synthetic data can enhance AI models for medical imaging tasks.

articles.title: FLORA CREATIVE PLATFORM (PRODUCT)
articles.summary: AI Creative Platform FLORA has launched all 4 of the best Image to Video models (Runway, Luma, Kling, and Hailuo) in one tool.

articles.title: SUPERMAVEN JOINS CURSOR
articles.summary: The code editing plugin's team is joining Cursor to continue developing the user experience.

articles.title: GOOGLE'S AI ‘LEARNING COMPANION' TAKES CHATBOT ANSWERS A STEP FURTHER
articles.summary: Google's Learn About site provides answers with visual and interactive elements and educational formatting.
